aboutUs.title: About Us
aboutUs.description: DigiMetal is your trusted digital platform for investing in gold and silver. We provide secure, transparent, and convenient ways to buy, sell, and store precious metals with assured purity and competitive pricing.

termsAndConditions.title: Terms & Conditions
termsAndConditions.content:
By accessing and using this service, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provision of this agreement.

**Use License**
Permission is granted to temporarily access the materials on our platform for personal, non-commercial use only.

**Disclaimer**
The materials are provided on an 'as is' basis. We make no warranties and disclaim all liability for indirect damages.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.content:
This Privacy Policy describes how your personal information is collected, used, and shared when you visit or make a purchase from our platform.

**Personal Information We Collect**
When you visit the site, we automatically collect certain information about your device, including information about your web browser, IP address, time zone, and some of the cookies that are installed on your device.

**How Do We Use Your Personal Information?**
We use the information that we collect generally to fulfill any orders placed through the site (including processing your payment information and providing you with invoices and/or order confirmations).
